title: Quest Nutri-Q 34210 Quick Press Electric Citrus Juicer / 2 Different Cone Sizes / 1.2L Jug/Adjustable Pulp Strainer/Dual Direction Juicing/Low Noise/Dishwasher Safe Parts
features: ELECTRIC CITRUS JUICER – This electric citrus juicer is great for making many fresh glasses of cool, refreshing fruit juice! All kinds of citrus fruits can be used on the juicer, and its quick press design makes it very easy to prepare yourself a delicious, healthy fruit drink without needing much strength. Its dual direction juicing feature ensures that every last tasty drop of juice will be extracted from whatever fruit you fancy.

2 DIFFERENT CONES – The juicer comes with 2 different cones provided – a small and a large sized one. The smaller cone is perfect for citrus fruits such as lemons, limes, tangerines and clementines, while the larger cone is ideal for bigger fruits such as grapefruits, oranges, and citrons. Also included is an adjustable pulp strainer, allowing you to choose whether you want your juice smooth, or with pulpy bits included, to get your juice exactly how you like it.

EFFICIENT AND QUIET – Some kitchen appliances are notorious for being quite loud – but not this juicer! Its 40W motor is energy efficient, and is enough to get all of the juice you need out of your fruits without making much noise in the process. The juicer is also guaranteed to stay stable, thanks to its non-slip feet holding it in place on your kitchen work-top, or any other surface you wish to use it on.

1.2 LITRE JUG – The jug provided has a capacity of 1.2 litres, storing several glasses worth of delicious juice in one use! It is also removable, meaning that the juice can be stored in the fridge to be chilled for later, and due to this it can also be easily washed, including in the dishwasher as all parts included are dishwasher safe except for the motor base. All parts are also BPA free for your peace of mind.

NUTRI-Q BY QUEST – Nutri-Q is the leading range of specialised healthy kitchen appliances, brought to you by the experts at Quest. From electric steamers and juicers, to low-fat grills and omelette makers, Nutri-Q provides you with healthier cooking alternatives that will make you feel great after every meal. Visit the Nutri-Q store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Easy Pour Spout The juicer's spout allows you to smoothly pour all kinds of juices with ease and minimal spillage. Two Cones Included Two cones (one small, one large) are included with the juicer, ideal for different kinds of fruits. Dual Direction The dual direction juicing functions ensures every last drop of juice is drained from the fruit. Pulp Strainer Choose whether you want a smooth or pulpy drink with the built-in adjustable pulp strainer. 1.2 Litre Jug The juicer's jug has space for several glasses worth of fresh juice, and can be stored in a fridge.
